summary: Plan-mode inventory classification for five open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned because the shard has no shared canonical, merge/fix actions are blocked, low-signal closeout is disabled, and the open PRs either need maintainer review, proof, author follow-up, or independent review.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft with proof and explicit maintainer-review signal; keep open as independent inventory item.
Related to the terminal chat acknowledgement family, especially #91049, but #90690 is a draft Android-specific PR lacking proof; no close action is allowed or justified.
Stacked follow-up to #90975 with distinct reseed behavior; related but not duplicate, and current proof/review state blocks any stronger action.
Related to the open tool-failure recovery product area, but #91493 is a distinct implementation PR blocked on proof and product/technical review.
Related to the cron timeout family and #86893, but it is a separate classifier patch blocked on real behavior proof; no close action is justified.
